stoppingPoint: Stop after high-risk gate migration design and metadata representation. Do not continue into compile-aware validation, live shader compile, or runtime gate enforcement in this sprint.

recommendedNextSprint.type: screen shader display/render watchdog migration proof
recommendedNextSprint.objective: Use fixture/temp files only to prove backup-before-mutation, separate process confirm, timeout restore, result logging, visible-display-independent recovery, and live-render-state-independent recovery before any stronger enforcement.
mustNotDo: do not run live shader compile
do not use active render state
do not remove current writable behavior without explicit approval

laterOptionalSprint.precondition: Only after display/render watchdog migration proof is completed or an explicit block/removal proposal is approved.
laterOptionalSprint.allowedDirection: standalone/temp shader fixture validation only if a non-live compiler path is proven safe
